desc: ConnectorOpsExtendAllUnusedConnectorsBy100mmCommand — ribbon wrapper for the bulk-extend helper.
summary: ConnectorOpsExtendAllUnusedConnectorsBy100mmCommand — ribbon wrapper for the bulk-extend helper.
usecase: Bulk extend-all after a fitting reseat.
precondition: Element resolvable via resolver or selection.
postcondition: Pipes created for every unconnected connector inside inner Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId OR selection.
2) Delegate to ClashSolverExtendAllUnusedConnectorsBy100mmCommand.
3) Tag tracker.

preprompts: Extending every unconnected connector by 100 mm…
